--- a/train.py

@@ -74,10 +74,25 @@
     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     logging.warning(f"Using device: {device}")

 

+    # Load checkpoint

+    ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/best.pt'

+    if not os.path.exists(ckpt_path):

+        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Checkpoint not found: {ckpt_path}")

+    ckpt = torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location=device, weights_only=False)

+    num_skills = ckpt['num_skills']

+    embed_dim = ckpt['embed_dim']

+    hidden_size = ckpt['hidden_size']

+    num_layers = ckpt['num_layers']

+    dropout = ckpt.get('dropout', 0.3)

+    state_dict = ckpt['model_state_dict']

+

+    model = DKT(num_skills, embed_dim, hidden_size, num_layers, dropout).to(device)

+    model.load_state_dict(state_dict)

+    logging.warning(f"Model loaded with {sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters()):,} params")

+

     train_dataset = AssistmentsDataset('/data/train.pt')

     val_dataset = AssistmentsDataset('/data/val.pt')

     logging.warning(f"Train samples: {len(train_dataset)}, Val: {len(val_dataset)}")

-    logging.warning(f"Num skills: {train_dataset.num_skills}")
